user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in ChatGPT search results and search features
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for search indexing; opted-out sites excluded from ChatGPT search answers
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: OAI-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety and compliance of ad landing pages submitted to ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only pages submitted as ads; not used for automatic web crawling or training
user_agents.opt_out: Not specified; only visits pages explicitly submitted as ads

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for content used in training OpenAI's generative AI models
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GPTBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered fetch for live responses in ChatGPT conversations and Custom GPTs
user_agents.scope: User-initiated web page visits; not automatic crawling; robots.txt may not apply
user_agents.opt_out: Not subject to robots.txt rules; initiated by user actions in ChatGPT

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Gather web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for training data collection
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Retrieve web content at Claude AI users' direction during conversations
user_agents.scope: User-triggered web access when Claude users ask questions requiring live web content
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search result quality and analyze content for search relevance
user_agents.scope: Web crawl to enhance search result accuracy and indexing for user search
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Build Google Search indexes and related products
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Google Search, Discover, Images, Video, News
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Index images for Google Images and Search features
user_agents.scope: Image-specific crawling for Google Images, Discover, Video, Search
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-Image / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Index videos for video-related Google Search features
user_agents.scope: Video-specific crawling for Google Search video features
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-Video / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Index content for Google News product
user_agents.scope: News-specific crawling for Google News and news.google.com
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-News / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Index products for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: Crawls for Google Shopping, Shopping tab in Search
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Storebot-Google / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Support Google Search testing and inspection tools
user_agents.scope: Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Search Console
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-InspectionTool / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic product-agnostic web crawling
user_agents.scope: One-off crawls, internal R&D, various product team fetches
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Optimize GoogleOther for image URL fetching
user_agents.scope: Generic image crawling for various product teams
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther-Image / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Optimize GoogleOther for video URL fetching
user_agents.scope: Generic video crawling for various product teams
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther-Video / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawl for Vertex AI Agents requested by site owners
user_agents.scope: Site owner-requested crawls for building Vertex AI Agents
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-CloudVertexBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Control Gemini training data and grounding usage
user_agents.scope: Manage content usage for Gemini models and Vertex AI API
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search result crawling to index content for Perplexity search results
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt file; verify IP ranges from https://www.perplexity.com/perplexitybot.json

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered fetches when users ask questions requiring live web page visits
user_agents.scope: User-requested fetch for accurate answers; visits pages when users ask questions
user_agents.opt_out: Perplexity-User generally ignores robots.txt; use robots.txt rules to control site access; IP ranges from https://www.perplexity.com/perplexity-user.json

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search features in Spotlight, Siri, and Safari across Apple ecosystem
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing and rendering webpage content
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow Applebot in robots.txt to prevent crawling

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines if crawled data can be used to train Apple foundation models and generative AI features
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages; analyzes data already crawled by Applebot for AI training purposes
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls content registered on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Only crawls URLs associated with Apple Podcasts registered content; does not follow robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Does not follow robots.txt; crawler is limited to Apple Podcasts URLs only

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl shared content to gather metadata like title, description, thumbnail
user_agents.scope: Content shared on Facebook, Instagram, Messenger; may bypass robots.txt for security checks
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / (may be bypassed for security/integrity checks)

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and relevance for users
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance Meta AI responses with citations and links
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-webindexer / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Improve advertising and other business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for ads optimization and business intelligence
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalads / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Train foundation AI models and improve products by indexing content
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product indexing
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalagent / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch individual links at user request for agentic AI capabilities and website navigation
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches to evaluate and improve AI task completion; may bypass robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: / (may be bypassed for user-requested fetches)

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Search engine crawling and indexing for Bing search results
user_agents.scope: Web pages and content for search index updates
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt with User-agent: Bingbot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; bingbot/2.0)
user_agents.purpose: Bing search crawler user-agent identification
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing

user_agents.name: Copilot
user_agents.purpose: AI assistant interactions and response generation
user_agents.scope: User-triggered queries and document processing

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve products and services; train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and AI training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amazonbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots.txt directives

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Content crawling for search eligibility in Alexa and Rufus; not for AI training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots.txt directives

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered actions requiring up-to-date information
user_agents.scope: Fetch live information for Alexa queries on behalf of users; not for AI training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots.txt directives

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl dataset
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to provide a copy of the Internet for research and analysis
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; also honors Crawl-delay parameter

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl dataset (older version)
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to provide a copy of the Internet for research and analysis
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt
